allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); try { const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('app/src/main/assets/plants.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Valid JSON. Plant count:', data.length\); data.forEach\(p => console.log\(p.name\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('JSON ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('app/src/main/assets/plants.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Plants:', data.length\); data.forEach\(p => { const instCount = p.instructions.length; console.log\(p.name + ' \(' + p.type + '\): ' + instCount + ' instructions'\); }\);")
